name: @ugs-gio/styles
description: MapLibre style modules for UGS map viewers. Source-of-truth for vector styling. Build outputs CDN-hosted JSON consumed via STAC renders extension.

scripts.preview: npm run build:json && npm run gen:sprites && npx --yes http-server -p 8080 -c-1 -o /preview/
scripts.dev: npm run build:json && npx --yes concurrently -k -n watch,serve "tsx watch scripts/build-json.ts" "npx --yes http-server -p 8080 -c-1 -o /preview/"
scripts.qa: npm run build:json && npx --yes http-server -p 8080 -d false -c-1
